issues.description: Duration is 'EndOfTurn' but effect text states 'during this turn'. Per duration rules, opponent turn effects with 'during' language should use 'DuringOpponentTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'

Target scope is 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' (allows choosing) but effect text says 'Give up to 1' which implies optional selection. Should be 'ChooseUpToOneOpponentCharacter' or equivalent optional-scoped target
